headline: The Hormuz Halt
summary: U.S. stocks had their worst week since Oct as oil spikes on the Iran conflict and jobs data stir inflation fears. Read more macro analysis here.

headline: Is Kimco Realty (KIM) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kimco Realty is offering fair value at today's price, this article looks at what the numbers say and how that stacks up across several valuation methods. With the share price at US$23.28 after a 1.1% decline over the last 7 days, recent returns of 8.2% over 30 days, 16.1% year to date, 13.9% over 1 year, 43.3% over 3 years and 46.8% over 5 years provide a useful backdrop for judging what you are paying today. Recent attention on Kimco Realty has centered around...
